item.title: Getting the Duramax C10 Back on the Road
item.description: Deboss Garage works on getting the Duramax C10 back on the road, focusing on the build and mechanical steps involved. A straightforward look at the project and the work needed to move it forward?

media:content.media:title: Getting the Duramax C10 Back on the Road
media:content.media:description: Deboss Garage works on getting the Duramax C10 back on the road, focusing on the build and mechanical steps involved. A straightforward look at the project and the work needed to move it forward?

item.title: Clutch Plates, Seals & Upgrades Coming in Hot
item.description: Clutch plates, seals, and upgrades are on the way for this build. A straightforward look at the parts going into the next stage of the project. What would you tackle first?

media:content.media:title: Clutch Plates, Seals & Upgrades Coming in Hot
media:content.media:description: Clutch plates, seals, and upgrades are on the way for this build. A straightforward look at the parts going into the next stage of the project. What would you tackle first?

item.title: L5P DPF Found, Headed to Edison Motors
item.description: We found a DPF for our L5P and are headed to Edison Motors next. A straightforward update on the truck build and the next step in the process. What comes next?

media:content.media:title: L5P DPF Found, Headed to Edison Motors
media:content.media:description: We found a DPF for our L5P and are headed to Edison Motors next. A straightforward update on the truck build and the next step in the process. What comes next?

item.title: Technique That Gets Rid of Rust
item.description: A proven method is put to work to remove rust, restore metal surfaces, and prevent further corrosion. How effective is this technique on heavily rusted parts?

media:content.media:title: Technique That Gets Rid of Rust
media:content.media:description: A proven method is put to work to remove rust, restore metal surfaces, and prevent further corrosion. How effective is this technique on heavily rusted parts?

item.title: Will the Cheapest Plasma Cutter Handle It?
item.description: A hands-on look at whether the cheapest plasma cutter can handle the job. Follow the build process and see how it performs in the garage. Will it get the cut done?

media:content.media:title: Will the Cheapest Plasma Cutter Handle It?
media:content.media:description: A hands-on look at whether the cheapest plasma cutter can handle the job. Follow the build process and see how it performs in the garage. Will it get the cut done?

item.title: Carbon Fiber Roof Scoop
item.description: Carbon Fiber Roof Scoop with a focus on the part and fitment details. A simple look at the modification process and garage work behind the scoop. What do you think of this roof scoop setup?

media:content.media:description: Carbon Fiber Roof Scoop with a focus on the part and fitment details. A simple look at the modification process and garage work behind the scoop. What do you think of this roof scoop setup?

item.title: Bronco Coyote Swap Build in 10 Minutes
item.description: A Bronco build centered on a Coyote engine swap, showing the modification process and garage work behind the project. What changes stand out most in this swap?

item.title: This Tire Power!
item.description: A quick look at a tire-focused repair and makeover project. The video centers on hands-on car work and the kind of mechanical detail that goes into a garage build. What changes stand out most?

media:content.media:description: A quick look at a tire-focused repair and makeover project. The video centers on hands-on car work and the kind of mechanical detail that goes into a garage build. What changes stand out most?

item.title: Everything Wrong With a 6.8 Ford Triton V10

item.title: Can This $300 Shipyard Find Be Saved?
item.description: A low-cost shipyard find is assessed to see if it can be restored or if it’s beyond saving. What condition is it really in after all this time?

media:content.media:title: Can This $300 Shipyard Find Be Saved?
media:content.media:description: A low-cost shipyard find is assessed to see if it can be restored or if it’s beyond saving. What condition is it really in after all this time?

item.title: Cummins Engine Surgery: New Heart for the Old Beast
item.description: A Cummins engine is installed or rebuilt as a “new heart” for an older vehicle, restoring power and reliability. What makes this swap so popular?

media:content.media:title: Cummins Engine Surgery: New Heart for the Old Beast

item.title: 2WD to 4WD Transformation
item.description: A vehicle undergoes a full transformation from rear-wheel or front-wheel drive into a capable four-wheel-drive system. What upgrades are required for the conversion?

media:content.media:title: 2WD to 4WD Transformation
media:content.media:description: A vehicle undergoes a full transformation from rear-wheel or front-wheel drive into a capable four-wheel-drive system. What upgrades are required for the conversion?

item.title: The only good thing about city driving
item.description: A lighthearted take on city driving highlights the small positives that make traffic and urban roads more tolerable. What makes it worth it?

media:content.media:title: The only good thing about city driving

item.title: LandCruiser Gets a High-Voltage Upgrade
item.description: A Toyota LandCruiser receives a high-voltage system upgrade, pushing it into modern electrified or advanced power territory. How does this change its performance and capability?

media:content.media:title: LandCruiser Gets a High-Voltage Upgrade
media:content.media:description: A Toyota LandCruiser receives a high-voltage system upgrade, pushing it into modern electrified or advanced power territory. How does this change its performance and capability?
